task_name: SIFT Homework Report Writing (Theoretical Proof + Programming Report)

subtask1.query: Please read the task instructions in workspace/query.md; the context/ directory provides hw_sift.pdf (homework requirements) and sift.py (existing implementation). Based on both, write a high-quality report report.md that includes: 1) theoretical proofs related to projective geometry; 2) a SIFT programming experiment report (algorithm analysis + results presentation). Save the final report file to the current working directory.
deliverables: report.md - Homework report (containing both the Written Assignment and Programming Assignment sections)
(Optional) illustration files - images referenced in the report, such as sift_keypoints_vis.png, etc.
